title: dendranthema × leucanthum
intro: Dendranthema × leucanthum, also known as Shasta daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. Dendranthema × leucanthum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
